results.name: yoke
results.description: A collar to help beasts of burden perform labor.

results.name: you make the card
results.description: These cards came from community-driven "You Make the Card" events, where the Magic community works through multiple stages of voting to create a card.

results.name: you matter
results.description: Cards that care about physical attributes of the player playing it

results.name: young pyromancer ability
results.description: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create a creature token.

results.name: yue
results.description: A Northern Water Tribe princess with a special connection to the moon spirit.

results.name: y value
results.description: Cards that use "Y" for a value, usually  for "+X/+Y" effects on creatures.

results.name: zagoth
results.description:
The black-green-blue-aligned triome of Ikoria.
Teeming rainforests with vast lily pools and swampy wetlands.

results.name: zanak
results.description: Setting of the Doctor Who serial "The Pirate Planet"

results.name: zei
results.description: Professor of anthropology at Ba Sing Se University, visiting the Si Wong Desert to search for Wan Shi Tong's Library.

results.name: zendikar angel
results.description: Angels from Zendikar, often but not always discerned by their multiple wings and a halo covering their eyes.

results.name: zenon
results.description: One of Kytheon's Irregulars, depicted second from the left on the card of the same name.

results.name: zeppelid
results.description: Floaty beasts of Ravnica. Not a Zeppelin.
